{{CargoRelic
|name=Lu Ji's Calligraphy
|class_id=22886
|rank=SSS
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=Lu Ji is a calligrapher from the Western Jin Dynasty. It is a letter to a friend inquiring about his recovery from illness. It was written in a cursive script that transitioned from archaic cursive to modern cursive, characterized by its gentle strokes and simple, robust style. The original piece contained nine lines with approximately eighty-four characters, but only three lines and twenty-two characters remain today. It is one of the earliest surviving literati ink writings to date, holding immense research value in the history of Chinese calligraphy
|fame=70
|art=69
|fth=61
|civ=109
|tech=53
|ss1=In Dragon Form, Crit DMG +3%<br>In Dragon Form, Wind DMG +30<br>All minion skins RUSH +10%
|ss2=In Dragon Form, Crit DMG +4%<br>In Dragon Form, Wind DMG +40<br>All minion skins RUSH +20%
|ss3=In Dragon Form, Crit DMG +5%<br>In Dragon Form, Wind DMG +50<br>All minion skins RUSH +30%
|ss4=In Dragon Form, Crit DMG +7%<br>In Dragon Form, Wind DMG +70<br>All minion skins RUSH +50%
|ss5=In Dragon Form, Crit DMG +9%<br>In Dragon Form, Wind DMG +90<br>All minion skins RUSH +70%
|ss6=In Dragon Form, Crit DMG +12%<br>In Dragon Form, Wind DMG +120<br>All minion skins RUSH +100%
|ss7=In Dragon Form, Crit DMG +12%<br>In Dragon Form, Wind DMG +120<br>All minion skins RUSH +100%<br>In Dragon Form, Crit DMG +10% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, INTEL gained +6%
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, DMG +30%
|skill3=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: This Relic's CIV +15
}}
